description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton that has ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and graphic lettering on the frontFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWram iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryGroove to the beats of rock 'n' roll with this white T-shirt from probase. The grpahic lettering on the front says "music is my religion" and the different names of music genres form a cool guitar shape giving this tee a funky vibe. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool casual look while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
